name: ames-general-mcps
description: Day-to-day general-purpose MCP servers curated by Oliver Ames. Includes Drafts, Excel, Google Workspace, iMCP, MarkItDown, Pandoc, Peekaboo, and Tinyfish integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Day-to-day general-purpose MCP pack for productivity workflows.
interface.longDescription: A curated bundle of Oliver's preferred day-to-day MCP servers: Drafts for note capture, Excel and Google Workspace for documents and spreadsheets, iMCP for native iOS/macOS app access, MarkItDown and Pandoc for document conversion, and Peekaboo for screen capture. Some servers require credentials.
